name: INA3221 3-Channel DC Current Sensor
description: The `ina3221` sensor platform allows you to use your INA3221 3-Channel DC Current Sensor ([datasheet](http://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/ina3221.pdf), [switchdoc](http://www.switchdoc.com/ina3221-breakout-board/)) sensors with ESPHome. The [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) is required to be set up in your configuration for this sensor to work.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: Manually specify the I²C address of the sensor. Defaults to `0x40`.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to check the sensor. Defaults to `60s`.

config_entries.label: Channel 1
config_entries.description: The configuration options for the 1st channel.

config_entries.label: Channel 2
config_entries.description: The configuration options for the 2nd channel. Same options as 1st channel.

config_entries.label: Channel 3
config_entries.description: The configuration options for the 3rd channel. Same options as 1st channel.
